title: sterculia gracilioides
intro: Sterculia gracilioides, also known as the 'Slender Sterculia', is a plant species belonging to the family Sterculiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains saponins and flavonoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Sterculia gracilioides include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
